title: Department of Family and Medical Leave (DFML) — Agency Landing Page
description: MA DFML agency landing page: overview of the Commonwealth's Paid Family and Medical Leave (PFML) program (G.L. c.175M), portal login links, contact numbers, annual reports, and regulatory resources. Includes a notice on the IRS extension of the transition period for PFML tax-withholding (IRS Notice 2026-6).

source.publisher: Massachusetts Department of Family and Medical Leave (DFML)

notes: Agency hub page, not a substantive policy document. Apply at paidleave.mass.gov; Contact Center (833) 344-7365. Governing statute M.G.L. c.175M.
